name: Marina Home Interiors
message: marinahomeinteriors.com Conceptualized in 1997, Marina Home Interiors Retail Network is a Dubai based premium home furnishings company and operates its stores across the Arabian Gulf region, Egypt and the Indian subcontinent. Marina Home is a household name across the countries it operates in and is synonymous with quality, creativity and a strong aspirational value proposition. Marina has proved its design ability in the selection of items that create an entrancing effect of unusual harmony.
